title: Sam Neill’s Cause of Death Was Pneumonia, Actor’s Agent Confirms
summary_full: The beloved New Zealand actor best known for his turn in “Jurassic Park” had “fought and beaten” lymphoma before he fell ill, according to a statement.
summary_public: The beloved New Zealand actor best known for his turn in “Jurassic Park” had “fought and beaten” lymphoma before he fell ill, according to a statement.
